mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(COLLECT_TIME + INTERVAL '15 minute', 'hh24:mi:ss') AS collectTime FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMANCE_LINKAGE_DATE

insert.if:
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST(PERFORMACEID, SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME) VALUES
(#{item.performaceid}, #{item.sysname}, #{item.port}, #{item.unit}, #{item.tmper}, #{item.rxCur}, #{item.rxMin}, #{item.rxMax}, #{item.rxAve}, #{item.txCur}, #{item.txMin}, #{item.txMax}, #{item.txAve}, #{item.ocrtime})
